case_title: GUADALUPE GARCIA VS. EGH, LLC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EUROPEAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT EGH, LLC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EUROPEAN GUEST HOUSE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
